strengths: Strong calendar and travel management experience
Proficient in MS Office, CRM, Asana, Excel pivot tables
weaknesses: Limited explicit senior executive (SVP) support examples
improvement_bullets: Supported executive-led performance review cycles by coordinating scheduling, tracking feedback completion, and preparing organizational documentation for leadership reviews.
Managed timekeeping processes and payroll verification for staff, ensuring accurate reporting and resolving payroll discrepancies in compliance with company policy.
Led and mentored junior administrative staff on operational workflows and best practices to ensure consistent support quality across the department.
Applied working knowledge of industry-specific compliance and regulatory standards to handle high-level documentation, ensuring organizational adherence to operational requirements.
Collaborated with department leaders to audit and streamline cost center documentation, facilitating accurate budget tracking and organizational administration.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Executive Assistant opportunity with CNA Insurance. I am interested in this opportunity because of CNA's reputation for empowering employees to reach their fullest potential while providing critical support to high-level leadership. What interests me about working for CNA is its commitment to creating a culture where employees feel they are part of something important; this mission-driven approach to corporate excellence inspires me because it aligns with my personal philosophy of proactive, dedicated service. I believe my tenured expertise in C-level support and my meticulous approach to executive operations would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a proactive mindset, identifying potential bottlenecks before they impact executive productivity. In fact, at Direct Clean Solutions, I recognized the need for improved data management and implemented an automated reporting system that cross-referenced CRM data with weekly performance metrics. This resulted in a significant increase in data accuracy and saved the executive team hours of manual review time each week. Ultimately, I know that the Executive Assistant role at CNA would allow me to bring my high-level calendar management skills to coordinate complex global schedules for your Claims Leaders. Additionally, my role as an Executive Administrative Assistant enabled me to develop my mentorship and process-improvement skills. At Apex Supply Co., I took on the initiative to train junior staff on a newly implemented digital document management system, which reduced document retrieval time by 50% for the entire department. I am excited by the opportunity to use my ability to manage sensitive, confidential information in working on high-visibility projects at CNA. I know that my strategic calendar management and proactive problem-solving align with what it takes to succeed in the Executive Assistant role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Millieann Velez
